texto: Listening is a gift of spiritual significance that you can learn to give to others. When you listen, you give one a sense of importance, hope and love that he or she may not receive any other way. Through listening, we nurture and validate the feelings one has, especially when he or she experiences difficulties in life.
explicacao: Citação de H. Norman Wright sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Listening is a gift of spiritual significance that you can learn to give to others. When you list…” articula reflexao, listening, spiritual em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

frase_original: Listening is a gift of spiritual significance that you can learn to give to others. When you listen, you give one a sense of importance, hope and love that he or she may not receive any other way. Through listening, we nurture and validate the feelings one has, especially when he or she experiences difficulties in life.

texto: Nurturing words show that you believe in the other party's capacity to learn, change and grow. One's mind is like a computer. Every message you send goes into one of two files: discounting or nurturing. The file with the most data will direct how one sees and feels about himself or herself. Messages that nurture are based on unconditional love which must be worked at, especially if you come from a discounting family. You will need to rely on Jesus to fill the void in your life with His presence and help you learn how to love unconditionall like He loves us.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a H. Norman Wright: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Nurturing words show that you believe in the other party's capacity to learn, change and grow. On…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, unconditional-love, nurturing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de mudanca e termino.

texto: In marriage, each partner is to be an encourager rather than a critic; a forgiver rather than a collector of hurts; an enabler rather than a reformer.
explicacao: Citação de H. Norman Wright sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “In marriage, each partner is to be an encourager rather than a critic; a forgiver rather than a c…” articula coragem, love, marriage em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como casamento e marriage.
